title: Meeting the Climate Challenge: Recommendations of the International Climate Change Taskforce
summary: Committee Members: Stephen Byers (Co-chair), Olympia Snowe (Co-chair), Bob Carr, John P. Holdren, Martin Khor Kok-Peng, Nathalie Kosciusko-Morizet, Claude Martin, Tony McMichael, Jonathon Porritt, Adair Turner, Ernst Ulrich von Weizsäcker, Ni Weidou, Timothy E. Wirth, Cathy Zoi
